---
title: "Appendix"
format: html
---

# Appendix A. Technical Notes

This appendix summarizes details that support the main paper without overloading the narrative. Full validation evidence is stored in the `docs/` and `outputs/tables/csv/` folders.

## RCA and MCP

RCA is computed as the country-product export share divided by the world product export share. MCP equals one when RCA is at least one and zero otherwise.

## ECI and PCI

ECI is recomputed by year and standardized within each annual distribution. Longitudinal changes describe relative position. PCI is an internal projection from country ECI to products.

## Product Space

The analytical Product Space for 2023 contains 701,978 positive edges. The 698-edge graph is a visual subset. Density and Opportunity Gain are computed from the analytical matrix.

## Models

Fixed-effects models include country and year fixed effects with country-clustered standard errors. They are descriptive and not causal.
